content: What is the probability distribution for BTC-USD in 7 trading days? Use the Markov distribution methodology with terminal threshold markets only. If valid horizon-matched anchors are missing, abstain instead of estimating buckets.

abstainReasons: No trusted terminal prediction-market anchors are available for this horizon.
Out-of-sample Markov R² is -0.008, so the model does not beat a historical-mean baseline.
data.report:
🚫 Diagnostics-only Markov output

No calibrated scenario distribution was emitted for BTC-USD at the 7-day horizon.

Why this abstained:
- No trusted terminal prediction-market anchors are available for this horizon.
- Out-of-sample Markov R² is -0.008, so the model does not beat a historical-mean baseline.


📊 Markov Distribution: BTC-USD | Horizon: 7d
Current: $66129.20 | Regime: bear
Anchors: 0 trusted | Anchor quality: NONE
Mixing: 6.1% Markov / 93.9% Anchors

⚠️ No trusted Polymarket anchors — distribution is 100% Markov-model driven
⚠️ Structural break detected (divergence=0.129); CI widened 50%
R²_OS: -0.008 (>0 = Markov adds value over mean)
